Icon Lexicon (Category-First)

A category-first icon set for documentation, architecture diagrams, and minor website usage.
The UI/app can choose any variant within a category (emoji, Lucide, FontAwesome, SVG, etc.).

🏛️ Architecture & Structure

Use for: architecture, system shape, standards, foundations, composition, “built environment”

  • Foundation / Base: 🧱 🪨 🗿 🧬
  • Blueprint / Design / Precision: 📐 📏 🧭
  • Construction / Assembly: 🏗️ 🧩 🧰 🧲
  • Buildings / Institutions: 🏛️ 🏢 🏰 🏦 🏚️
  • Boundaries / Zones: 🚧 🚪 🧱
  • Patterns / Reuse: ♻️ 🧩 🧱

Suggested consistent meanings (optional):

  • 🧱 = foundation / primitive / base layer
  • 📐 = design/spec rigor
  • 🏗️ = in-progress / evolving architecture
  • 🏛️ = governance/enterprise architecture

🗺️ Context, Landscape & Navigation

Use for: bounded context, scope, domain map, routes, “where does this live?”

  • Map / Context Boundary: 🗺️ 🧭
  • Location / Anchor / Ownership: 📍 🏷️
  • Routing / Traffic / Flows: 🛣️ 🛤️ 🚦 ➡️
  • Direction / Discovery: 🧭 🔎 🧵
  • Crossing / Edges: 🌉 🚪 🚧

Suggested meanings (optional):

  • 🗺️ = domain/context map
  • 📍 = authoritative source / ownership point
  • 🚦 = decision gate / policy check / control point
  • 🌉 = integration boundary crossing

📚 Knowledge, Docs & Reference

Use for: documentation, ADRs, standards, how-tos, “institutional memory”

  • Library / Reference: 📚 📖
  • Notes / Doc: 🗒️ 📝 📄
  • Knowledge Store / Index: 🗃️ 🗄️ 🗂️𐩕
  • Learning / Study: 🧠 🎓 🔍
  • Guidance / Rules: 📌 ✅ ⚠️

Suggested meanings (optional):

  • 📚 = canonical reference / docs hub
  • 🗒️ = working doc / internal notes
  • 🗃️ = indexed knowledge / repository catalog

📜 Contracts, Specs & Interfaces

Use for: OpenAPI, schemas, events, SLAs, “this is the agreement”

  • Contract / Spec: 📜 📃 🧾
  • API / Interface / Surface: 🔌 🧩
  • Schema / Shape: 🧬 📐
  • Versioning / Compatibility: 🏷️ 🔖 ♻️
  • Validation / Guarantees: ✅ ☑️ 🧪

Suggested meanings (optional):

  • 🗂️ = folder
  • 📜 = contract/spec (API/event/schema)
  • 🔌 = integration point / port
  • 🧬 = schema/data shape (esp. domain/event)

🧩 Components, Modules & Boundaries

Use for: services, packages, modules, slices, assemblies

  • Component / Part: 🧩
  • Module / Package / Unit: 📦 🗂️
  • Composition / Assembly: 🧩 ➕ 🏗️
  • Seams / Adapters: 🔌 🔗 🧷
  • Ownership / Team boundary: 🏷️ 👥

Suggested meanings (optional):

  • 📦 = deployable/module boundary
  • 🔗 = link between modules / dependency

🌀 Flow, Lifecycle & Dynamics

Use for: pipelines, orchestration, state changes, eventing, async

  • Flow / Process: 🌀 🔄 ➡️ ֎ (enternity)
  • Orchestration / Coordination: 🎛️ 🧭 🧵
  • Async / Events: 📣 📨 🛰️
  • State / Status: 🟢 🟡 🔴 ✅ ⚠️ ☯
  • Time / Scheduling: ⏱️ ⏳ 🕒

Suggested meanings (optional):

  • 🌀 = system dynamics / workflow motion
  • 🔄 = lifecycle/retry/loop
  • ⏱️ = latency/perf

💧🔥🌱 Nature Metaphors (Energy, Growth, Risk)

Use for: capacity, “heat”, stability, maturity, resilience, evolution

💧 Stability / Cooling / Calm

  • 💧 🌊 🧊 🫧
    Use for: reliability, smoothing, buffering, “cooling down incidents”

🔥 Heat / Risk / Urgency

  • 🔥 ⚡ 🚨 💥
    Use for: incidents, hotspots, bottlenecks, “this is dangerous”

🌱 Growth / Maturity / Sustainability

  • 🌱 🌿 🌳 ♻️
    Use for: evolution, adoption, long-term maintainability, sustainability

☀️🌙 Visibility / Diurnal cycles

  • ☀️ 🌙 ✨ 🌥️
    Use for: uptime windows, “day/night ops”, monitoring clarity

🌬️ Wind (Change / Variability)

  • 🌬️ 💨 🪁
    Use for: change, churn, “winds of requirements”, variable traffic

Suggested meanings (optional):

  • 🔥 = operational risk / urgent issue
  • 💧 = stabilizing work / hardening
  • 🌱 = iterative improvement / growth
  • 🌬️ = change pressure / variability

🌐 World & Worldbuilding (Scope, Terrain, Externalities)

Use for: environments, regions, external deps, geography metaphors, “the world outside the system”

  • World / Global: 🌐 🌍 🌎 🌏
  • Space / External / Remote: 🛰️ 🪐 ✨
  • Mountains / Hard constraints: 🏔️ ⛰️ 🗻 🪨
  • Settlements / Habitats: 🏕️ 🏘️
  • Biomes / Regions: 🏞️ 🏜️ 🏝️ 🏖️ 🌋
  • Exploration / Frontier: 🧭 🗺️ 🔭

Suggested meanings (optional):

  • 🛰️ = external system / third-party / remote dependency
  • 🏔️ = immovable constraint (legal, physics, compliance)
  • 🏝️ = isolated subsystem / “island architecture”

🛡️ Security, Trust & Compliance

Use for: authn/authz, secrets, privacy, policy enforcement

  • Security / Guarding: 🛡️ 🔐 🔒
  • Identity / Access: 🪪 🗝️
  • Policy / Compliance: 📜 ✅ ⚖️
  • Threat / Attack: 🐞 🧨 🚨

🧪 Quality, Testing & Verification

Use for: tests, validation, correctness, confidence

  • Test / Experiment: 🧪 🔬
  • Verify / Approve: ✅ ☑️ ✔️
  • Bug / Defect: 🐞
  • Measurement: 📏 📐 📊

📦 Delivery, Ops & Observability

Use for: CI/CD, deploys, runtime, telemetry, incidents

  • Deploy / Release: 🚀 📦 🏁
  • Runtime / Infra: 🖥️ ☁️ 🗄️
  • Logging / Metrics / Tracing: 🧾 📈 📊 🧵
  • Alerting / Incidents: 🚨 🔥 ⚠️
  • Tools / Maintenance: 🛠️ 🔧 🧰

Canonical Meaning Set (Optional)

If you want a small set that’s always consistent:

  • 🏛️ = Architecture / Governance
  • 🧱 = Foundation / Primitive
  • 🗺️ = Context / Domain Map
  • 📍 = Ownership / Source-of-truth anchor
  • 📚 = Reference / Docs hub
  • 📜 = Contract / Spec
  • 🗂️ = Folder
  • 🧩 = Component
  • 🔌 = Port / Integration seam
  • 🌀 = Workflow / System dynamics
  • 🛰️ = External dependency
  • 🔥 = Hotspot / Incident / Risk
  • 💧 = Stabilization / Hardening
  • 🌱 = Growth / Evolution
